text: Event planning and decoration is a lucrative business with low startup costs. Ugandans celebrate everything: weddings, introductions (kwanjula), graduation parties, fundraisers (harambee), baby showers, church events. Startup: decorative materials (artificial flowers, ribbons, drapes) UGX 300,000-800,000, transport for equipment UGX varies, phone for marketing. Total startup: UGX 500,000-1,500,000. Revenue per event: small events UGX 200,000-500,000, weddings UGX 500,000-2,000,000+, corporate events UGX 1,000,000+. Wedding season peaks November-December and January-February. Start by decorating for friends/family at cost to build portfolio. Take professional photos of every event. Marketing: WhatsApp Status, Instagram, Facebook bridal groups. Key skill: ability to transform simple venues with creative decoration.
